brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. She doesn't sell products directly; she seamlessly integrates them into her actual routine.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.hook: Sweat, sculpt, repeat. (Sienna, mid-workout, determined.) No room for doubt, especially not in your activewear. Watch this!
strategy.angle: Stop holding back. These 'Arrowow Active' Seamless Sage Green Leggings are your secret weapon for every rep. Engineered for zero distractions (yes, they're 100% squat-proof!) and seamless comfort, so you can push harder, knowing you're fully covered. Power through your toughest sets with undeniable confidence.
strategy.cta: Ready to transform your workouts? Don't just watch, *do*. Tap the link in bio to snag your 'Arrowow Active' Seamless Sage Green Leggings and unlock your full potential today! #ArrowowActive #SquatProof #NoExcuses

script.script_text: Sweat, sculpt, repeat. No room for doubt, especially not in your activewear. Watch this! Alright team, quick reality check: Stop holding back. These 'Arrowow Active' Seamless Sage Green Leggings are your secret weapon for every rep. Engineered for zero distractions – yes, they're 100% squat-proof! – and seamless comfort. So you can push harder, knowing you're fully covered. Power through your toughest sets with undeniable confidence. Ready to transform your workouts? Don't just watch, *do*. Snag your 'Arrowow Active' Seamless Sage Green Leggings and unlock your full potential today! #ArrowowActive #SquatProof #NoExcuses
visual_cues: Sienna, in a brightly lit modern gym, mid-squat or lunge with a determined expression. Camera is selfie-style, slightly above eye level, with a slight handheld shake and dynamic pacing.
Sienna finishes a rep, stands up, slightly breathless. She quickly adjusts her high ponytail or clips her hair.
Sienna positions herself to highlight the 'Arrowow Active' Seamless Sage Green Leggings, showing off the fabric and seamless fit around her hip and leg.
Sienna performs a deep squat, effortlessly demonstrating the 100% 'squat-proof' quality of the leggings. A quick jump cut shows her wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.

Sienna grabs her massive pastel Stanley cup, takes a quick sip, then looks at the camera with an encouraging smile. A clear call-to-action text overlay appears on screen: 'Shop 'Arrowow Active' now!' along with the hashtags #ArrowowActive #SquatProof #NoExcuses.
audio_cues: Upbeat, high-energy electronic pop music begins at the start of the video and continues playing throughout.
Sienna's voice is slightly breathless, high-energy, encouraging, and has a casual Australian accent. Her pacing is fast and punchy.
Subtle sound effects of movement or light fabric rustling are present during Sienna's actions.

text_critic_report.feedback: The script successfully avoids all prohibited phrases and the tone is consistent with the persona's description: high energy, encouraging, and authentic. The call to action is present but does not use the exact prohibited phrase 'buy this product now' or 'link in bio'.
